questionHtml: State and explain what happens to the kinetic energy of an emitted photoelectron.
markschemeHtml:
stays the same ✓

as energy depends on the frequency of light ✓

 

Allow reference to wavelength for MP2.

Award MP2 only to answers stating that KE decreases due to Doppler effect.

meta.title: State and explain what happens to the kinetic energy of an emitted photoelectron.
